summary: Complete extraction pipeline failure across all 9 volumes (211 chapters). Zero extractable story mechanics, craft observations, reader rewards, or narrative hooks. All chapter_card entries returned llm_unavailable_fallback_stubs with 0.0 confidence. No distillable content available for mechanism promotion.

Fallback distillation pattern for sources where LLM service is unavailable. Represents structural metadata preservation when source content is inaccessible. Documents failure modes: llm_unavailable_all_chapters, zero_confidence_all_extractions, upstream_data_pipeline_delivery_failure. Enables audit trail construction for pipeline restoration scenarios.

Catalog of failure modes observed: llm_service_unavailable_for_all_chapters, data_pipeline_delivery_failure, source_content_inaccessible, no_extractable_story_mechanics, no_reader_rewards_extracted, no_narrative_hooks_identifiable, no_state_progression_derivable, no_turning_points_capturable. Documents systematic absence of actionable chapter metadata across entire source corpus.
